actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / FH-LSZ target time-series harness extension
proposal_allowed_reason: Instrumentation support is not a retained or proposed-retained closure certificate.
required_next_gate: Rerun production chunks with the extended harness, then apply target-observable autocorrelation/ESS, finite-source-linearity, scalar-pole/FV/IR/model-class, and canonical-Higgs identity gates.

scalar_two_point_timeseries_summary.strict_limit: finite-mode stochastic C_ss(q) is not kappa_s until an isolated pole, dGamma/dp^2 at the pole, and canonical Higgs normalization are derived

source_timeseries_summary.strict_limit: dE/ds is not dE/dh until kappa_s is derived by scalar LSZ/canonical normalization
source_timeseries_summary.target_timeseries_rule: diagnostic per-configuration tau=1 effective-energy slopes for autocorrelation/ESS gates; not a physical dE/dh readout

strict_non_claims: does not use reduced smoke output as production evidence
does not treat target time series as physical dE/dh
does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
verdict: The direct lattice harness now serializes per-configuration same-source target time series for the source-response effective energy slopes and scalar two-point C_ss/Gamma_ss modes.  This removes the instrumentation blocker for future autocorrelation and ESS checks, but the reduced smoke output is not production evidence and it does not derive kappa_s or the canonical-Higgs source identity.
